name: The Forest Hiker
summary: Breathtaking hike through the Canadian Rocky Mountains
description: This 5-day adventure takes you through some of the most spectacular scenery on earth. You'll hike through dense forests, cross crystal-clear streams, and camp under the stars.

name: The Sea Explorer
summary: Exploring the pristine coastline of the Pacific Northwest
description: Join us for a 7-day sea kayaking expedition through hidden fjords, remote islands, and abundant wildlife. Perfect for nature lovers and photography enthusiasts.

name: The Snow Adventurer
summary: Extreme winter trekking in the Swiss Alps
description: This challenging 4-day expedition is for experienced winter trekkers only. You'll navigate through deep snow, climb frozen waterfalls, and sleep in mountain huts at high altitude.
